name: ChartForgeX topology visual coverage
interactiveContract: Inline SVG elements expose ids, CSS classes, hrefs, title tooltips, and data-cfx/data-node/data-edge hooks. Complete topology HTML pages are static by default and opt into cfx-topology-* interaction events when requested.
baselinePolicy: Every generated topology SVG/PNG pair is release-gated by the shared visual-baseline.json comparison contract. This capability manifest additionally verifies required SVG/HTML/PNG files, stable metadata hooks, and topology-specific behavioral evidence.

artifacts.name: visual-topology-explorer
artifacts.title: Topology Explorer
artifacts.notes: Regional grouped topology with hubs, branches, bridgeheads, route ports, labels, links, tooltips, metadata hooks, SVG, HTML, and PNG.

artifacts.name: visual-entity-relationship-overview
artifacts.title: Entity Relationship Overview
artifacts.notes: Screenshot-inspired relationship map with reusable icon ids, color accents, multiline cards, stacked edge labels, dotted/dashed/solid links, selected-state metadata, SVG, HTML, and PNG.

artifacts.name: visual-identity-mind-map
artifacts.title: Identity Mind Map
artifacts.notes: Centered mind-map topology with balanced left/right branches, required icon resolution, compact descendant pills, rounded branch routes, and SVG/HTML/PNG output.

artifacts.name: visual-secure-access-arbitrary-icons
artifacts.title: Secure Access Arbitrary Icons
artifacts.notes: Screenshot-inspired access topology using catalog-supplied inline SVG artwork, custom icon nodes, gateway bars, dashed policy tunnels, and static SVG/HTML/PNG output.

artifacts.name: visual-mini-correlation-map
artifacts.title: Mini Correlation Map
artifacts.notes: Compact selected-asset relationship map for dashboard cards and drilldown panels with panel background, icon cards, and multiple arrow marker choices.

artifacts.name: visual-evidence-timeline-relationship
artifacts.title: Evidence Timeline Relationship
artifacts.notes: Timeline-like evidence stream mapped to one selected entity using topology nodes, circular markers, typed links, and multiline event cards.

artifacts.name: visual-impact-dependency-overview
artifacts.title: Impact Dependency Overview
artifacts.notes: Dependency and blast-radius topology with upstream services, owned applications, downstream consumers, risk links, and reusable relationship-label plates.

artifacts.name: visual-ownership-evidence-bundle
artifacts.title: Ownership Evidence Bundle
artifacts.notes: Ownership and evidence topology for selected assets, showing owner teams, certificates, DNS, IP evidence, findings, and exported evidence bundles.

artifacts.name: visual-reusable-regional-topology
artifacts.title: Reusable Regional Topology
artifacts.notes: Coordinate-free regional topology built from generic groups, nodes, links, metrics, symbols, and layout policy.

artifacts.name: visual-replication-mesh-explorer
artifacts.title: Replication Mesh Explorer
artifacts.notes: Site-to-site replication mesh with icon nodes, bidirectional paths, explicit edge ports, route lanes, metric labels, scenario switching, and offender highlighting support.

artifacts.name: visual-replication-mesh-route-motion
artifacts.title: Replication Mesh Route Motion
artifacts.notes: Script-free SVG route pulse plus sampled animated GIF and APNG exports for a scenario-driven topology route.

artifacts.name: visual-force-relationship-graph
artifacts.title: Force Relationship Graph
artifacts.notes: Moderately dense force-directed relationship graph with low-ink SVG/PNG defaults, HTML search, status/group filtering, zoom, pan, and on-demand edge labels.

artifacts.name: visual-force-busy-relationship-graph
artifacts.title: Busy Force Relationship Graph
artifacts.notes: Busy force-directed relationship graph using degree-weighted hub mass, linear repulsion, overlap avoidance, HTML filtering, zoom, pan, and on-demand edge labels.

artifacts.name: visual-relationship-radial-ego-graph
artifacts.title: Relationship Radial Ego Graph
artifacts.notes: Selected application relationship graph with the root in the center, direct conversations around it, second-hop conversations farther out, and capped expansion for large networks.

artifacts.name: visual-relationship-radial-500-ego-graph
artifacts.title: Relationship Radial 500 Ego Graph
artifacts.notes: Large 500-node relationship ego graph: all nodes remain present as dots, first-hop conversations spread around the root, second-hop conversations fan out farther, and HTML focus reveals labels on demand.

artifacts.name: visual-subnets-site-links-map
artifacts.title: Subnets and Site Links Map
artifacts.notes: Subnet-to-site mapping topology with overlapping/orphan subnet states, bridgehead mapping, site links, and route labels.

artifacts.name: visual-dc-connectivity-map
artifacts.title: Domain Controller Connectivity
artifacts.notes: Selected-object connectivity topology for domain controllers, connection objects, service checks, and partner health.

artifacts.name: visual-ad-sites-hierarchy
artifacts.title: AD Sites Hierarchy
artifacts.notes: Hierarchy-style site map with hubs, branches, bridgeheads, primary and backup links.

artifacts.name: visual-replication-health-hub
artifacts.title: Replication Health Hub
artifacts.notes: Compact replication health view with central hub, grouped sites, dense dot nodes, and critical path emphasis.

artifacts.name: visual-directory-health-replication
artifacts.title: Directory Health Replication
artifacts.notes: Small directory-health topology with site cards, domain controller nodes, and cross-site replication status.

artifacts.name: visual-service-dependency-map
artifacts.title: Service Dependency Map
artifacts.notes: Generic service dependency topology showing upstream/downstream service health without TestimoX-specific types.

artifacts.name: visual-directory-level-window
artifacts.title: Directory Level Window
artifacts.notes: Forest/domain/group/user hierarchy rendered as levels 2..3 with ancestor breadcrumb context.

artifacts.name: visual-team-hierarchy-builder
artifacts.title: Team Hierarchy Builder
artifacts.notes: Team/org topology generated from parent-child member data with level filtering and wrapped crowded levels.

artifacts.name: visual-nested-user-hierarchy
artifacts.title: Nested User Hierarchy
artifacts.notes: Parent-child directory fixture with nested OUs, groups, and users using tiered hierarchy buses and fit-to-panel rendering.

artifacts.name: visual-nested-user-hierarchy-left-right
artifacts.title: Nested User Hierarchy Left-to-Right
artifacts.notes: The same parent-child model rendered horizontally to validate alternate hierarchy flow and bus diagnostics.

artifacts.name: visual-nested-user-hierarchy-bottom-top
artifacts.title: Nested User Hierarchy Bottom-to-Top
artifacts.notes: The same parent-child model mirrored vertically to validate upward hierarchy flow and bus diagnostics.

artifacts.name: visual-nested-user-hierarchy-right-left
artifacts.title: Nested User Hierarchy Right-to-Left
artifacts.notes: The same parent-child model mirrored horizontally to validate reverse hierarchy flow and bus diagnostics.

artifacts.name: visual-geographic-topology-map
artifacts.title: Geographic Topology Map
artifacts.notes: Topology-native geographic layout with typed coordinates, projected site markers, curved WAN route arcs, labels, regional callouts, and SVG/PNG metadata hooks.

artifacts.name: visual-geographic-region-map
artifacts.title: Geographic Region Map
artifacts.notes: Dotted-map chart with AMER, EMEA, and APAC hubs, weighted markers, and cross-region route overlays.

artifacts.name: visual-site-distribution-map
artifacts.title: Site Distribution Map
artifacts.notes: Dotted-map chart for site distribution, site health, and regional route overlays.

artifacts.name: visual-wan-latency-map
artifacts.title: WAN Latency Map
artifacts.notes: Map-backed route chart for WAN latency paths that can sit behind an HtmlForgeX region panel.
